expectations.text: The decision says `prd_file` is official source of truth and `progress_file` is supplemental.
expectations.evidence:
I_CAN_SEE_SESSIONSTART_CONTEXT
Source of truth: `prd_file` official; `progress_file` supplemental resume data only.
Resolved `progress_file`: evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt
Selected story: highest-priority `passes: false` story.
Before story-specific discovery: dispatch fresh implementer; read only `prd_file`, `progress_file`, and nearby `AGENTS.md`.

expectations.text: The decision resolves the default `progress_file` to `dirname(prd_file) + "/progress.txt"` or the fixture `progress.txt` path.
